tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get mailbox profile details for the authenticated user.

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all labels in the user's mailbox.

tools.name: get_label
tools.description: Get a label by label ID.

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: List message IDs in the mailbox with optional Gmail query and label filters.

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Get a full message resource by message ID.

tools.name: list_threads
tools.description: List thread IDs in the mailbox with optional Gmail query and label filters.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Get a full thread resource by thread ID.

tools.name: list_drafts
tools.description: List drafts in the mailbox.

tools.name: get_draft
tools.description: Get a draft by draft ID.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a raw RFC822 message immediately.

tools.name: create_draft
tools.description: Create a draft from a raw RFC822 message.

tools.name: delete_draft
tools.description: Delete a draft by draft ID.

tools.name: send_draft
tools.description: Send an existing draft or send a one-off draft payload.

tools.name: modify_message
tools.description: Add/remove labels on a message.

tools.name: trash_message
tools.description: Move a message to trash.

tools.name: untrash_message
tools.description: Restore a message from trash.

tools.name: delete_message
tools.description: Permanently delete a message.

tools.name: modify_thread
tools.description: Add/remove labels on a thread.

tools.name: trash_thread
tools.description: Move a thread to trash.

tools.name: untrash_thread
tools.description: Restore a thread from trash.

tools.name: delete_thread
tools.description: Permanently delete a thread.

tools.name: create_label
tools.description: Create a mailbox label.

tools.name: update_label
tools.description: Patch a mailbox label by label ID.

tools.name: delete_label
tools.description: Delete a mailbox label by label ID.
